new_classes.label_en: still wine of fresh grapes with PDO, actual alcoholic strength > 15% vol, other, in containers > 2 L (CN 2204 29 28)
new_classes.label_de: Wein aus frischen Weintrauben mit g.U., tatsächlicher Alkoholgehalt > 15 % vol, anderer, in Behältnissen > 2 L (KN 2204 29 28)
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO) as defined in Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22, with an actual alcoholic strength by volume exceeding 15% vol, other than those covered by preceding subheadings, presented in containers holding more than 2 litres (CN subheading 2204 29 28).

coverage_explanation: The legal note for CN 2204 29 22–78 (including 22042928) states that these codes cover wines with a protected designation of origin (PDO/g.U.) as defined in Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22. The axioms capture: (1) PDO quality via ProtectedDesignationOfOriginQuality, (2) large container (> 2 L) via LargeContainer (consistent with the 2204 29 subheading group covering containers > 2 L), and (3) actual alcoholic strength > 15% vol via decimalRange restriction. The specific content of Additional Note 6(a) (the precise regulatory definition of PDO for wines) is referenced but not further formalised in the ontology, so coverage is partial. The 'other' qualifier (distinguishing 22042928 from other PDO-large-container codes in the same range such as 22042922 or 22042926) cannot be fully captured without explicit enumeration of the excluded sibling subheadings. Coverage score reflects these gaps.
